item.title: Log streaming — clawhq logs
steps: Create cmd/logs.go with the logs subcommand
Implement docker logs streaming with follow mode
Implement log filtering by category (agent, gateway, cron, error)
Implement `clawhq logs --cron <job>` for per-job execution history
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq logs` streams container logs in real-time
`clawhq logs --cron heartbeat` shows cron job execution history
--since flag correctly bounds output by time
